creator: koziol@hdfgroup.org
text:
On Mar 11, 2011, at 3:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of science/hdf5-18,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/155458 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

	Looks good to me.

		Quincey

> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/155458
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
